commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=088e6c7e7f15c23ec5e0e2881d3cfd6f14dc9c53)
commands.review_summary:
The PR skips the embedded agent pre-prompt overflow precheck for `ownsCompaction` context engines except `preassembly_may_overflow`, logs the skip, and adds overflow-loop tests.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +45. Total +57 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main runs the pre-prompt precheck for non-skipped submissions, and the PR body includes lossless-claw before/after logs. I did not run the contributor's live setup in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a maintainer compatibility decision about changing the documented context-engine precheck contract, not a safe autonomous repair.

target.title: fix(agents): skip pre-prompt precheck when context engine owns compaction
target.author: mpz4life
